_readme: Mimora user settings. Edit by hand; restart the app to apply. Delete a key (or this whole file) to fall back to the built-in default. Keys starting with '_' are ignored and may be used as comments.
_color_theme: UI color theme: 'dark' or 'light'. Loads config/themes/<name>_schema.json; restart the app to apply.
_english_accent: Target accent: 'american' or 'british'. Drives the TTS voices and the espeak dialect used for pronunciation scoring.
_voice: Default TTS voice; null means the accent's default (af_heart / bf_emma). Must belong to the selected accent. American: af_heart, af_bella, af_nicole, af_sarah, af_sky, am_adam, am_michael, am_echo, am_eric, am_liam. British: bf_emma, bf_alice, bf_isabella, bf_lily, bm_george, bm_daniel, bm_fable, bm_lewis.
_engine: Pronunciation engine: 'phoneme' (default; espeak reference + phoneme ASR), 'acoustic' (Wav2Vec2 embeddings + DTW), or 'none' (scoring off: skips the ~1.2 GB recognizer entirely, every take is accepted - for slow machines; compare the takes by ear). Restart to apply.
_pronunciation_score_threshold: Score (0-100) at or above which an attempt is accepted; lower = more forgiving.
_phoneme_good_mode: Phoneme-engine GOOD anchor: 'global' (one calibrated anchor for all phrases; the default the 0-5 buckets were calibrated under) or 'ceiling' (per-phrase anchor from the reference audio, so a flawless read maps to 100 per phrase; costs an extra recognizer pass and shifts scores off the bucket calibration). Only used when the phoneme engine is active.
_max_record_seconds: Hard limit on a single recording, in seconds (safety stop for a stuck key).
_silence_timeout: Seconds of continuous silence (after speech has begun) before the take auto-stops. Minimum 0.5.
_silence_threshold: RMS level (0..1) at or above which a chunk counts as speech rather than silence. Raise it only if a noisy room keeps the take from stopping.
_save_recordings: Diagnostic recording dumps: when true, every take writes the spoken reference (model.wav), the raw mic capture (raw.wav), the normalized signal (normalized.wav) and the phrase text (phrase.txt) to records/, each overwritten per take so only the latest is kept. Off by default: it puts your voice on disk on every attempt.
_llm_backend: 'local_server' starts llm_server automatically; 'lm-studio' uses an already-running LM Studio app.
_external_model_path: GGUF model file for the local_server backend. Relative paths resolve against the project root.
_external_n_ctx: Context window size (n_ctx) for the local GGUF model. Overrides the hardware-detected value; delete the key to fall back to it.
_practice_text_file: Source text shown in the input panel at startup. Relative paths resolve against the project root.
_practice_text_collapsed: Start with the practice-text box collapsed (the caption row stays visible and shows a short preview of the text). Also toggled by clicking the 'Practice text:' caption in the app.
_phrase_gen_window_sentences: How many consecutive sentences of the source text are sent to the LLM per request (sliding window).
_phrase_gen_window_repeats: How many phrases are generated at one window position before the window slides forward by half its size.
_phrase_length: Phrase length to generate: 'full' (a complete sentence) or 'fragment' (a 2-4 word fragment). Also changeable in the settings window ('Phrase length').
_reference_speed: Reference playback speed: one of 1.0, 0.9, 0.8 (lower is slower). Also changeable in the settings window ('Reference speed'); the Slow ▶ button plays 0.1 below this value.
_translation_language: Language the practice phrase is translated into and shown under the phrase in the hero card. '' means translation off. One of: '', Russian, Ukrainian, Spanish, French, German, Italian, Chinese, Japanese. Loads the NLLB-200 model (~2.4 GB) when set. Also changeable in the settings window ('Translation').
_warm_up: Run a dummy pass over every loaded model at startup so the first take has no first-call latency. Off by default: startup is faster and the first take pays that latency instead; set to true to move the wait to startup.
_show_prosody: Show the intonation & stress block (pitch/F0 and energy charts together). Also toggled by the 'Intonation & stress' collapse header in the app and by the settings window. Collapsed by default: while collapsed the charts are hidden and the prosody computation is skipped, making analysis noticeably faster on slow machines.
_show_face: Show the articulation face in the hero card's score row. Toggled from the settings window ('Show articulation face').
_user_name: Display name of the practicing user; editable in the settings window ('Your name') and saved automatically.
